activeIncidents.name: TEST - IBM Planning Analytics major outage
activeIncidents.body: This is a test notice for dashboard validation. IBM Planning Analytics Workspace is currently unavailable for some customers. Engineering teams are actively working to restore service.

incident_updates.body: This is a test notice for dashboard validation. IBM Planning Analytics Workspace is currently unavailable for some customers. Engineering teams are actively working to restore service.

testFileNote: Temporary dashboard test file. Rename to ibm-planning-analytics.json and upload to wallboardtest/data for testing. Do not leave this test data in production.
